question: Which products cost more than 50 dollars? List their names.
goldSQL: SELECT name FROM products WHERE price > 50

question: How many users are there?
goldSQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM users

question: What is the total revenue from all payments that have been paid?
goldSQL: SELECT SUM(amount) AS total FROM payments WHERE status = 'paid'

question: List each order id and the name of the user who placed it.
goldSQL: SELECT o.id, u.name FROM orders o JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id

question: How many orders did each user place? Show the user name and the order count.
goldSQL: SELECT u.name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count FROM users u JOIN orders o ON o.user_id = u.id GROUP BY u.name

question: List all product names ordered by price, cheapest first.
goldSQL: SELECT name FROM products ORDER BY price ASC

question: Which users have never placed an order? List their names.
goldSQL: SELECT name FROM users WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM orders)

question: Which products are tagged BOTH 'work-from-home' AND 'premium'? List their names.
goldSQL: SELECT p.name FROM products p JOIN product_tags pt ON pt.product_id = p.id JOIN tags t ON t.id = pt.tag_id WHERE t.name IN ('work-from-home', 'premium') GROUP BY p.id, p.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT t.name) = 2
